docs.name: Bento Grid
docs.description: Responsive masonry-style grid with staggered scroll-reveal, pointer-follow spotlight, hover lift and shadows, optional spin borders, and spring micro-interactions per cell.

props.name: title
props.description: Headline text displayed at the bottom of the card.

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting body text shown beneath the title.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon element rendered inside a pill at the top of the card.

props.name: background
props.description: Optional decorative layer (image, gradient, SVG) rendered behind the content.

props.name: cta
props.description: Call-to-action label that slides up into view on hover.

props.name: href
props.description: When supplied the card renders as an anchor element.

props.name: className
props.description: Grid span and sizing classes forwarded to the cell wrapper, e.g. col-span-2 or row-span-2.

props.name: spinBorder
props.description: Enable the spinning conic-gradient border effect (same technique as the hero button). Replaces the static border.

props.name: spinBorderColors
props.description: Two hex/CSS color values for the conic gradient. Defaults to ["#E2CBFF", "#393BB2"] (purple–indigo).

props.name: interactiveSpotlight
props.description: When true (default), a violet radial highlight follows the pointer inside the card on fine-pointer hover.

props.name: theme
props.description: Surface and text colors; injected by BentoGrid on each child.

variants.label: Features
Showcase
Stats
Team

docs.overview: BentoGrid lays out content cards in an asymmetric masonry-style grid inspired by Apple's design language. Each cell can span multiple columns or rows, with animated entrance and hover effects.

scenarios.title: Product feature overview
scenarios.description: Showcase multiple features in a single glanceable grid without overwhelming the user.

scenarios.title: Personal portfolio grid
scenarios.description: Display projects, skills, and social links in an editorial bento layout.
